arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy trying to ‘make things better’ at Manchester United
arts.sum: The interim boss is taking charge of one last match at home to Leicester on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy sends stern warning to Ruben Amorim with no funds for new Man Utd boss
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has underlined the challenge that faces Ruben Amorim at Manchester United with the incoming manager set to be hampered by a lack of funds in the transfer market

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim set for job talks with Ruud van Nistelrooy as Man Utd legend gets key backing
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will begin life as Manchester United's new manager on Monday and his first task will be to decide the future of caretaker boss and ex-Red Devils striker Ruud van Nistelrooy

arts.ttl: 'I believe' - Ruud van Nistelrooy set for Manchester United meeting with Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy will finish his four-game stint as caretaker manager of Man Utd on Sunday before meeting Ruben Amorim on Monday.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy is hopeful Ruben Amorim will keep him on at Manchester United - as interim boss prepares to meet incoming Portuguese coach for first time
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy, whose two-week spell as interim manager will finish against Leicester City on Sunday, wants to continue in the assistant's role that he enjoyed under Erik ten Hag.

arts.ttl: Five Man United legends predict Ruud van Nistelrooy's future after Ruben Amorim arrival
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy takes charge of Manchester United for the fourth and final time as interim head coach against Leicester City at Old Trafford in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick asks for reunion with Bayern Munich star, Real Madrid and Manchester United also keen
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies will be a player in demand in 2025, and Barcelona are one of the clubs plotting to take him away from Bayern Munich next summer. In recent weeks, Barcelona have expressed in-house doubts about the left-back position in Hansi Flick’s squad. arts.ttl: Manchester United interested in loan deal for Paris Saint-Germain star that previously sold for €95m
arts.sum: Manchester United’s pursuit of a new striker has taken them to Paris Saint-Germain and France star Randal Kolo Muani, who could be made available for loan during the 2025 winter transfer window. Incoming manager Ruben Amorim is likely to be looking for a new striker during the first venture into the transfer market. arts.ttl: New Man United head coach Ruben Amorim talks-up Sporting Lisbon star as Portuguese drops major transfer hint
arts.sum: Sporting Lisbon manager Ruben Amorim says that Pedro Goncalves could "play for any team in the world" amid suggestions that Manchester United want to sign him next year.

arts.ttl: Manchester United star shares two-word injury update in major Ruben Amorim boost
arts.sum: The latest Man Utd news as incoming head coach Ruben Amorim might be about to be handed a major fitness boost just in time for his Old Trafford arrival.
